description: Construction of the 750MW Kafue Gorge Lower hydropower station to increase Zambia's generation capacity. The project is financed by Chinese development banks with sovereign guarantee.
Expansion and rehabilitation of the national electricity transmission and distribution grid to reduce technical losses and improve reliability. Covers 5,000 km of transmission lines.
Construction and rehabilitation of 8,000 km of roads connecting provincial and district centres. Funded through fuel levy, road user charges, and external financing.
Construction of a dual carriageway between Lusaka and Ndola to reduce travel time and improve safety on Zambia's busiest road corridor.
Construction of 10,000 affordable housing units in Lusaka, Kitwe, and Ndola for NAPSA members and low-income earners. Part of the government's housing deficit reduction strategy.
Development of a digital mortgage application and management platform to reduce processing time from 90 days to 14 days and expand access to housing finance.
